entity_modal.tag_placeholder: Add a tag and press Enter
entity_modal.types_empty: No types available in this namespace
entity_modal.attrs_empty: This type has no configurable attributes
entity_modal.attachment_dropzone: Drag files here or click to pick

entity_merge_modal.warning_destructive: After merge the entity on the right will be deleted; its links and attributes move to the left one.
entity_merge_modal.tags_union_hint: Tags are merged automatically without picking a side.
entity_merge_modal.choice_required: Pick a side for every conflicting field
entity_merge_modal.namespace_mismatch: Merging is allowed within a single namespace only
entity_merge_modal.both_notes_error: Merging two notes is not supported

settings_hub_page.title: CRM settings
settings_hub_page.subtitle: Configure types, templates and access
settings_hub_page.card_spaces_description: Manage company namespaces, access and edit.
settings_hub_page.card_templates_description: Predefined sets of entity and relationship types.

errors.enum_needs_values: {{section}}: enum field "{{key}}" needs enum_set_id or values
errors.key_both_sections: Key "{{key}}" cannot be both required and optional

entity_card.empty_pick_subtitle: from the list on the left

schema_builder.ph_desc: AI instruction: how to fill this field

namespace_tasks_page.title: Namespace tasks
namespace_tasks_page.subtitle: Namespace background jobs: knowledge imports, AI note analyses, daily and period summaries, integrations.
namespace_tasks_page.empty: No tasks in this namespace yet.
namespace_tasks_page.confirm_cancel_msg: Task {{task_id}} will be marked for cancellation.
namespace_tasks_page.confirm_rollback_msg: All entities and relationships created by task {{task_id}} will be removed. This action cannot be undone.

templates_page.title: Namespace templates
templates_page.subtitle: Pre-built sets of entity and relationship types for new namespaces
templates_page.ph_template_description: Briefly: what tasks this template is for
templates_page.no_template_selected: Select a template on the left to edit
templates_page.confirm_delete_template_msg: Template “{{name}}” will be deleted along with all its types. This cannot be undone.
templates_page.no_types: No types in this template yet
templates_page.confirm_delete_type_msg: Type “{{type_id}}” will be removed from the template. This cannot be undone.
templates_page.field_is_event_hint: Entities of this type take part in task workflows: boards, status stages, due dates, and assignees where the namespace supports them.
templates_page.field_check_duplicates_hint: When saving, the platform may enforce duplicate detection rules for this entity type.
templates_page.field_is_context_anchor_hint: Entities of this type can be the main context for notes and threads, not only mentions in text.
templates_page.field_is_voice_target_hint: When saving a voice recording on a note, an entity of this type can be set as the note voice—on whose behalf it is saved.
templates_page.note_semantics_flags_locked_hint: Types under the note branch (note and subtypes) cannot use these modes.
templates_page.required_fields_hint: Fields without which the entity cannot be saved
templates_page.optional_fields_hint: Fields recommended to fill but not blocking save
templates_page.task_board_template_hint: Namespaces created from this template will get these column presets (unless changed later).
templates_page.task_board_empty: This template has no task types — add the Task type or a subtype whose parent is task.
templates_page.label_template_id_hint: Stable template id in the system (Latin letters, usually snake_case). Used in APIs and when picking a template for a new namespace; avoid changing it once in use.
templates_page.label_name_hint: Human-readable template name in admin lists and cards.
templates_page.label_description_hint: Short note on what this template is for — visible when administrators choose a template.
templates_page.label_icon_hint: Icon in the template catalog and wherever the template is shown.
templates_page.meta_section_hint: Catalog name, description, and icon; entity types are configured below. Note defaults and task board presets live in the same template metadata.
templates_page.field_type_id_hint: Unique type code in the company (Latin letters, usually snake_case). Ties entities, field schema, and settings together.
templates_page.field_type_name_hint: Type name in the UI: lists, cards, filters.
templates_page.field_parent_hint: Parent defines hierarchy and behaviour branch (e.g. note or task): subtypes inherit the parent context.
templates_page.field_icon_hint: Type icon in navigation and entity lists.
templates_page.field_color_hint: Accent color for the type in the UI (badges, cards).
templates_page.field_weight_hint: Weight for influence and ranking in the knowledge graph: higher values pull related nodes more strongly.
templates_page.field_flags_hint: Behaviour switches for the type; see each toggle’s own tooltip for details.
templates_page.field_description_hint: Text for administrators; may appear in type help.
templates_page.field_prompt_hint: Instructions for the model when extracting entities of this type from text (knowledge import, AI note analysis).
templates_page.field_namespaces_hint: Namespaces where this template type is available by default; you can narrow the set.
templates_page.required_fields_title_hint: Attribute schema required before an entity card can be saved.
templates_page.optional_fields_title_hint: Attributes that may be left empty; the card still saves without them.
templates_page.preview_required_hint: How the required-fields block will look in the API after save.
templates_page.preview_optional_hint: How the optional-fields block will look in the API after save.

access_request_modal.how_body: Your request will be sent to the entity owner. Once approved, you will be able to view the data.
access_request_modal.message_placeholder: Tell the owner why you need access…
access_request_modal.include_deps_desc: The request will cascade to related entities up to the chosen depth.

knowledge_import_modal.no_namespace_warning: Select a specific namespace in the sidebar — import always targets one namespace.
knowledge_import_modal.step_mode_desc: Choose what should be produced from the uploaded material.
knowledge_import_modal.step_types_desc: Which entity types to extract. Empty selection means all namespace types are allowed.
knowledge_import_modal.types_empty: No entity types configured in this namespace.
knowledge_import_modal.types_hint_all: Empty selection = all namespace types are allowed.
knowledge_import_modal.step_source_desc: Upload files and/or paste text. At least one source is required.
knowledge_import_modal.dropzone_label: Drop files here or click to choose
knowledge_import_modal.dropzone_hint: PDF, DOCX, TXT, MD, HTML and other formats
knowledge_import_modal.step_settings_desc: Optionally tune how long documents are chunked.
knowledge_import_modal.split_desc: Split material into chunks by markdown headings.
knowledge_import_modal.mode_graph_desc: Extract entities, relationships, tags — build graph.
knowledge_import_modal.mode_notes_only_desc: Store texts as notes without entity extraction.
knowledge_import_modal.mode_notes_desc: Store texts as notes without entity extraction.

namespace_modal.template_hint: Namespace is created with a preconfigured set of entity types.
namespace_modal.name_hint: Latin letters, digits and underscore only. Must start with a letter.
namespace_modal.description_placeholder: Describe what this namespace is for
namespace_modal.grants_err_pick_user: Pick a user from the list
namespace_modal.label_template_hint: Preconfigured set of entity types and relationships used to bootstrap the namespace.
namespace_modal.label_name_hint: New namespace identifier: Latin letters, digits and underscores; appears in URLs and APIs.
namespace_modal.label_description_hint: A note for your team about what this namespace is for.
namespace_modal.label_integrations_hint: External systems already linked to this namespace (read-only in this dialog).
namespace_modal.label_name_readonly_hint: Namespace identifier cannot be changed from this form after creation.

share_modal.err_pick_user: Pick a user from the list

note_page.no_id_message: Open a note from the feed on the "Notes" page.

note_edit.entity_search_none_matching_voice: No entities of an allowed type for the note voice in this namespace.
note_edit.entity_search_none_matching_anchor: No entities of an allowed type for the context anchor.
note_edit.placeholder_description: What happened, what was discussed, what's worth remembering...
note_edit.placeholder_tag: Type a tag and press Enter
note_edit.err_name_or_description_required: Fill in either title or note text
note_edit.err_namespace_required: No namespace selected for the new note

entity_delete_modal.question: Delete this entity?
entity_delete_modal.hint: Relationships and attachments will be deleted along with the entity. This action cannot be undone.

access_requests_page.title: Access requests
access_requests_page.subtitle: Incoming requests to access your entities

tasks_page.board_blocked: Board is not available in this mode
tasks_page.board_not_ready: Task board is not ready yet

entities_page.delete_entity_confirm: Delete "{{name}}"? Relationships and attachments will be removed permanently.
entities_page.merge_dnd_hint: Drag a card by the handle onto another to merge. Shift+click — merge, Ctrl+click — select.
entities_page.drag_merge_handle: Drag onto another card to merge

import_wizard_cta.empty_entities_hint: This space has no entities yet—import your knowledge using the import wizard.

daily_notes_page.empty_period: No notes for the selected period
daily_notes_page.empty_period_hints: Widen the date range, select all namespaces in the sidebar if needed, or use search. Imported notes belong to the integration namespace. The diary filters by note date (event day in the source); entity cards show created_at (import time) — for older imported notes, extend the range backward.

spaces_page.title: Namespaces
spaces_page.subtitle: All company namespaces
spaces_page.empty_message: No namespaces yet. Create the first one.

namespace_note_defaults.section_title_hint: How the note voice is chosen—the entity on whose behalf the voice recording is saved—when it is not set explicitly in the form.
namespace_note_defaults.section_hint: If the note voice is not selected on the note card, the rule below applies.
namespace_note_defaults.voice_mode_label_hint: What to put in the note-voice field on save when none is selected: current user's person entity, empty, or last chosen voice.
namespace_note_defaults.voice_mode_hint: Stored in this namespace or template settings and used when saving a voice recording on a note if the note voice is not chosen explicitly.
namespace_note_defaults.show_ui_label: Show note voice picker in the note editor
namespace_note_defaults.show_ui_label_hint: When off, the note voice control is hidden in the note editor.

space_detail_page.subtitle: Namespace settings and entity types
space_detail_page.no_types: No entity types in the company yet. Create the first one — it will become available in this namespace.
space_detail_page.type_all_spaces_hint: This type is linked to all namespaces (*). You cannot remove it from this space only; edit the type's namespace list.
space_detail_page.sidebar_menu_hint: Navigation items in the CRM left rail for this namespace. By default the tree is built from allowed types; here you can save a snapshot or switch back to automatic layout.
space_detail_page.task_board_hint: Kanban stages for tasks (type task) and subtypes whose parent is task. Stage id is stored in attributes.status: lowercase Latin letters, digits and underscores; must start with a letter.
space_detail_page.task_board_empty: This namespace has no task types yet—enable the Task type or a subtype whose parent is task.
space_detail_page.task_board_err_stages: Each board needs at least one stage with both id and label filled in
space_detail_page.task_board_err_stage_id: Invalid stage id. Use lowercase Latin letters, digits and underscores; first character must be a letter.
space_detail_page.task_board_err_duplicate_id: Duplicate stage id on the same board
space_detail_page.task_board_err_min_stages: A board must keep at least one stage
space_detail_page.meta_section_hint: Short info about the namespace, note defaults, and save; the namespace id itself is not edited here.
space_detail_page.meta_name_hint: Technical namespace id: used in URLs, APIs and data keys; set when the space is created.
space_detail_page.meta_description_hint: Team-facing note about what this namespace is for; does not affect permissions or schema.
space_detail_page.meta_stat_entity_count_hint: How many entities are already stored in this namespace.
space_detail_page.meta_stat_used_types_hint: How many distinct entity types appear in this namespace’s data.
space_detail_page.meta_stat_can_update_hint: Whether the list of types attached to the namespace can be changed given policy and existing data.
space_detail_page.sidebar_menu_section_hint: Controls CRM left-rail items for this namespace: snapshot the current type-derived tree or revert to automatic layout.
space_detail_page.task_board_section_hint: Kanban columns for tasks: stage ids are written on tasks and drive the board columns.
space_detail_page.task_board_col_stage_id_hint: Stored in task attributes.status; use a-z, 0-9 and underscore; first character must be a letter.
space_detail_page.task_board_col_stage_title_hint: Column title on the task board.
space_detail_page.task_board_col_color_hint: Column color on the board; optional.
space_detail_page.confirm_remove_from_namespace_msg: Type “{{type_id}}” will no longer be available in this namespace; the type definition row for this namespace will be removed. Templates and other namespaces are unchanged.

entity_type_create_mode_modal.title: New entity type
entity_type_create_mode_modal.intro: Start from scratch or copy a definition from entity types defined in your space templates (for example deal, project).
entity_type_create_mode_modal.option_blank_desc: Open the editor with an empty schema. You configure everything manually.
entity_type_create_mode_modal.option_presets_desc: Pick a ready-made type from all company templates. Field schema and options are copied into the draft; you set a new type_id.

entity_type_preset_picker_modal.title: Types from space templates
entity_type_preset_picker_modal.intro: Use the list on the left to filter by template. Select a type card and click Done — the editor opens with a copy of its fields and settings.
entity_type_preset_picker_modal.empty_no_templates: There are no space templates. Create a template under Templates and add entity types to it.
entity_type_preset_picker_modal.empty_no_presets: None of your company templates define entity types yet. Add types under Templates.
entity_type_preset_picker_modal.empty_no_types: This template has no entity types
entity_type_preset_picker_modal.empty_no_kind_match: No types in this category. Change the filter.

integrations_page.title: Integrations
integrations_page.subtitle: Space «{name}»
integrations_page.scope_hint: Connection and import apply only to this space; you do not need a separate namespace for the integration.
integrations_page.amocrm_oauth_credentials: OAuth is configured by your platform administrator (the Amo app and server-side settings). Here you only enter your amo subdomain and start sign-in. If sign-in fails or you see an error, contact your administrator.
integrations_page.amocrm_oauth_redirect: If you configure the OAuth app in your Amo account, set Redirect URI to the address below — you can copy it.
integrations_page.amocrm_unified_sync_started: AmoCRM sync started: entities, then custom fields catalog
integrations_page.amocrm_sync_started: AmoCRM import started in the background
integrations_page.amocrm_fields_started: AmoCRM custom fields sync started in the background
integrations_page.amocrm_sync_active_conflict: An AmoCRM import for this space is already running
integrations_page.amocrm_fields_active_conflict: AmoCRM fields sync for this space is already running
integrations_page.amocrm_task_poll_timeout: Timed out waiting for the AmoCRM task in the UI. Check the Tasks page.
integrations_page.auto_sync_hint: On the platform schedule, the same flow runs as the Synchronize button: entities, then the custom fields catalog. Active AmoCRM OAuth is required for the user who saves these settings.
integrations_page.auto_sync_cron_help: Minute, hour, day of month, month, day of week — croniter semantics (interpreted in the timezone below).
integrations_page.auto_sync_tz_help: IANA zone name, e.g. Europe/Moscow or UTC.
integrations_page.auto_sync_cron_required: Enter a cron expression or turn off scheduled sync
integrations_page.auto_note_ai_hint: For each new note imported from AmoCRM during sync, an analysis task is created (analyze-only mode) with default settings.

graph_page.empty_search: No matches for the current filter
graph_page.empty_import_hint: The graph is empty in this mode. You can load an existing knowledge base into the current space.

integration_auto_note_ai.failed: Failed to save note AI analysis setting

amocrm.fields_failed: Failed to update AmoCRM custom fields catalog

note.analyze_already_running: AI analysis for this note is already running
